source.extractionPolicy: Only short factual measurements and normalized classifications are retained; descriptions and images are excluded.

profiles.title: Bamboo
profiles.scientificName: Hundreds of species among dozens of genera from the Poaceae

profiles.title: Brazilian Pau Rosa
profiles.scientificName: Aniba roseaodora, written as A. rosodora by some authors

profiles.title: Bubinga
profiles.scientificName: Guibourtia spp., the three principal species are G. demeusei, G. pellegriniana, and G. tessmannii

profiles.title: Cyprus Cedar
profiles.scientificName: Cedrus brevifolia, some authors treat this species as a variety or subspecies of C. libani

profiles.title: Hybrid Mahogany
profiles.scientificName: Swietenia macrophylla × mahogani , also sometimes written as Swietenia × aubrevilleana

profiles.title: Ipe
profiles.scientificName: Handroanthus serratifolius, along with H. impetiginosus , and several other lesser-used commercial Handroanthus species

profiles.title: Pink Lapacho
profiles.scientificName: Handroanthus impetiginosus , formerly in the Tabebuia genus as Tabebuia impetiginosa

profiles.title: Thinwin
profiles.scientificName: Imbralyx leucanthus, very commonly listed as Millettia genus under older synonyms M. leucantha or M. pendula

profiles.title: Yellow Lapacho
profiles.scientificName: Handroanthus ochraceus , still commonly listed under the older synonym Tabebuia ochracea
